coat_colors: all colors except white and liver

description.overview: A modern German breed mixing Chow Chow, Wolfspitz, and Samoyed. Eurasiers are calm, confident dogs who are devoted to family but reserved with strangers.
description.temperament: Known for being confident, calm, intelligent.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A modern German breed mixing Chow Chow, Wolfspitz, and Samoyed. Eurasiers are calm, confident dogs who are devoted to family but reserved with strangers.
